questions.question: Chandrayaan-3 successfully soft-landed on the Moon in:
questions.explanation: Vikram lander touched down 23 August 2023 near south pole.

questions.question: India's G20 presidency culminated with the summit held in:
questions.explanation: G20 Leaders' Summit, New Delhi, September 2023.

questions.question: The Digital Personal Data Protection Act was enacted in India in:
questions.explanation: DPDP Act received assent in August 2023.

questions.question: The 'PM Gati Shakti' scheme focuses on:
The new criminal laws (Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita etc.) came into effect from:
India became the ___ largest economy in the world in 2024:
questions.explanation: India is the 5th largest by nominal GDP (as of 2024).

questions.question: Mission LiFE launched by India stands for:
The Women's Reservation Bill passed in 2023 reserves what % of seats?
questions.explanation: Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam: 33% in Lok Sabha and state assemblies.

questions.question: Which country joined BRICS in January 2024?
questions.explanation: Iran, UAE, Egypt, Ethiopia joined; Saudi Arabia invited.

questions.question: India's first indigenous aircraft carrier is named:
The theme of India's G20 presidency was:
options: One Earth One Family One Future
questions.explanation: 'One Earth, One Family, One Future' — from Vasudhaiva Kutumbakam.
